title.zh: 课题组成立！刘华清、杨佳慧加入广西大学
title.en: Lab established! Huaqing Liu and Jiahui Yang join Guangxi University

content.zh: 2025年7月，刘华清博士和杨佳慧博士正式加入广西大学农学院，成立土壤生态与水土保持课题组。课题组聚焦植物多样性与土壤水碳耦合、土壤侵蚀与水土保持等前沿方向，欢迎有志青年加入！
content.en: In July 2025, Dr. Huaqing Liu and Dr. Jiahui Yang officially joined the College of Agriculture at Guangxi University, establishing the Soil Ecology and Conservation Lab. The lab focuses on plant diversity–soil water-carbon coupling, soil erosion and conservation, and welcomes aspiring students to join!

title.zh: 欢迎研究生罗曼玉加入课题组！
title.en: Welcome graduate student Manyu Luo to our lab!

content.zh: 热烈欢迎罗曼玉同学加入土壤生态与水土保持课题组！罗曼玉将作为硕士研究生开展相关研究工作。期待她在课题组的学习和科研中不断成长，取得丰硕成果！🎉
content.en: We are delighted to welcome Manyu Luo to the Soil Ecology and Conservation Lab! Manyu will join as a graduate student to conduct related research. We look forward to her growth and achievements in the lab! 🎉
